title: rsa::function calls key_size_bytes (extra server round-trip) on every operation
description: rsa.rs::function calls self.key_size_bytes(client) to size the output buffer, which issues a wh_Client_RsaGetSize RPC to the server. This doubles the server round-trips per RSA operation. Since self.bits is already stored on the struct, the output size is always bits/8 bytes for RSA private-encrypt/public-decrypt. Fix: size the output buffer as (self.bits / 8) as usize (capped) without the extra RPC. key_size_bytes can remain as a public method for callers who need it.
